goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 10:00' and should go to 'bishops stortford'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'saturday'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'arrival time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'gonville and caius college'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave after 10:00 and should go to bishops stortford
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on saturday
Make sure you get price and arrival time
You are also looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called gonville and caius college
Make sure you get entrance fee and postcode
